cards.jyutping: tung4 zing2 zo2 zoeng1 saang1 jat6 kaa1 bei2 zyu1 taai3 taai2 wo3
cards.english: Peppa and George made a birthday card for Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 saang1 jat6 faai3 lok6

cards.jyutping: ngo4 ne1 fan6 hai6 ging1 hei2 ge3 saang1 jat6 lai5 mat6 aa3

cards.jyutping: gan1 zyu6 zung6 wui6 jau5 gang3 do1 ging1 hei2 gaa4

cards.characters: 食咗份生日早餐先啦，慢慢享受啦
cards.jyutping: sik6 zo2 fan6 saang1 jat6 zou2 caan1 sin1 laa1 maan6 maan2 hoeng2 sau6 laa1
cards.english: Eat your birthday breakfast first, take your time and enjoy it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 mei6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 快啲啊，我哋仲有嘢要準備㗎
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 aa3 ngo5 dei6 zung6 jau5 je5 jiu3 zeon2 bei6 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 ji5 ging1 sik6 jyun4 keoi5 ge3 saang1 jat6 zou2 caan1 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 mei6 dak1 aa3

cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hai6 mai6 jau5 di1 me1 bei3 mat6 ne1

cards.jyutping: gan1 bun2 mou5 me1 bei3 mat6 daan6 hai6 nei5 m4 jap6 dak1 lai4 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 aa3 bat1 jyu4 nei5 hai2 haak3 teng1 dou6 co5 haa6 tau2 haa5 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 得喇，Peppa，我知道客廳喺邊度㗎
cards.jyutping: dak1 laa3 ngo5 zi1 dou3 haak3 teng1 hai2 bin1 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: Okay, Peppa, I know where the living room is.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1

cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 aa3

cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 gei2 do1 seoi3 ngo5 dei6 zau6 jiu3 caap3 gei2 do1 kei4 laap6 zuk1 soeng5 heoi3

cards.jyutping: hou2 je5

cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 bat1 jyu4 nei5 ceot1 heoi3 faa1 jyun4 go2 dou6 hang4 jat1 zan6 aa1

cards.jyutping: zuk1 nei5 saang1 jat6 faai3 lok6 zuk1 nei5 saang1 jat6 faai3 lok6

cards.characters: 係兩張去劇院嘅飛，今晚㗎

cards.english: They're two tickets to the theater, for tonight.

cards.english: Mrs. Pig loves going to the theater.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 今晚我同嫲嫲會留喺度

cards.english: Grandma and I will stay here tonight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.english: To look after the two little ones for you.

cards.english: This birthday has been so great!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E21 Mommy Pig's Birthday［豬太太的生日］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我真係全世界最幸運嘅媽咪嚟啊
